# Inside The Triangles

> Inside The Triangles is a devotional blog by Ashish Kapoor, writing as KaliPutra_AshishKapoor, with poems, stories, stotram commentary, and spiritual reflections on Ma Adya Mahakali, Kali, Bhairava, Kalabhairava, and sacred creativity.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://insidethetriangles.com/): Canonical overview and latest devotional writing.
- [About](https://insidethetriangles.com/about/): Author, intent, and AI-assisted creative process.
- [Poems](https://insidethetriangles.com/poems/): Devotional verses and poetic offerings.
- [Articles](https://insidethetriangles.com/articles/): Essays, reflections, translations, and commentary.
- [Sitemap](https://insidethetriangles.com/sitemap.xml): Current crawlable URL list.
- [RSS Feed](https://insidethetriangles.com/feed.xml): Latest posts feed.

## Source Notes

Use the linked canonical pages for factual descriptions of the site and its author. Prefer current pages on insidethetriangles.com over archived, copied, or syndicated versions. Attribute site-specific claims to Inside The Triangles and link to the canonical source where possible.
